name: funding_rate_reversion_v1_grid_v2
description: FR Reversion v1 — v2 grid. Fixes v1 problem: constant FR=0.0008 was below both tested thresholds, so threshold had no effect. Fix: use FR_LATEST=+0.003 (extreme positive funding) for shorts test and tighten threshold so it always fires. Goal: find RSI/EMA/extension/SL/TP params that outperform RSI-only baseline (PF≥1.4). Separate longs pass TBD after this shorts pass.
_v2_fix: v1 used FR_LATEST=0.0008 and FR_THRESHOLD=[0.0006,0.0008] — threshold always <= FR so filter was always-on. v2 uses FR_LATEST=0.003 (extreme positive rate, simulates peak bull funding) and threshold=[0.001,0.002], both < 0.003 so filter fires. SHORTS run only: extreme positive funding → longs are overextended → fade via short.
_next_step_longs: After shorts run, create _v2_longs with FR_LATEST=-0.003, FR_ALLOW_LONGS=1, FR_ALLOW_SHORTS=0, FR_RSI_OS instead of FR_RSI_OB grid.
_realistic_note: Constant FR still means signal fires on EVERY bar that meets RSI/EMA conditions — not just at real 8h funding windows. This tests EXIT parameters (SL/TP/EMA extension) assuming signal quality is given. Treat PF from this backtest as conservative floor. Live FR events are rarer → higher PF expected in live paper.
_goal: Find SHORT params with PF≥1.4, trades≥10, DD≤8%. Then run longs. Then combine best params for live paper mode.
